supabaseBranchValidation.note: Supabase preview branches are usage-billed; prefer local validation unless owner approval records the branch cost.

sharedIdentityEcosystem.strategy: Reuse shared person/organization/testimony/service_activity records; do not create an isolated Neon target.
sharedIdentityEcosystem.setupAction: Do not run generated-app Neon setup for shared-identity ecosystem apps.

standaloneCustomerGenerated.strategy: Use an isolated Neon project or app-scoped branch for standalone/customer-generated apps.
standaloneCustomerGenerated.setupAction: Use AppEngine generated-app database setup after the placement decision is recorded.
